headline: Assessing Textron (TXT) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness And Beechcraft Denali Program Progress
summary: Why Textron is on investors’ radar today Textron (TXT) is drawing attention after mixed recent share performance, with a small 1 day gain contrasted by declines over the past week, month, and past 3 months. This is prompting a closer look at its fundamentals. See our latest analysis for Textron. At a share price of $88.77, Textron’s short term share price return has softened, with a 30 day share price return decline of 11.91%. However, longer term total shareholder returns of 21.58% over one...
